utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Each of these must be fully specified with relevant details. In the final property solution, all six items are present. The property item includes address, type, price, currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, and move-in date — fully detailed. The financing item includes purchase price, down payment, interest rate, mortgage term, closing costs, currency, and approval timeline — complete. The legal_services section lists a service name, level, cost, currency, features, and completion date — fully specified. The moving_services section includes service name, level, cost, currency, features, and move date — complete. The setup_services section includes service name, cost, currency, services included, and setup timeline — complete. The total_budget section provides all required cost breakdowns and totals with currency — complete. Therefore, all six items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution selected a detached house in the West Oak Trails area, Oakville, priced at CAD $885,000. This is a purchase property, not a rental. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the most similar match is the 'Family House' (CAD $650K, rating 10), as it meets the same family-oriented profile (4 bedrooms, double garage, family setting) and is within the user's budget range. The financing option clearly follows a traditional mortgage structure (20% down payment, 25-year term, 5.2% interest), which corresponds to the 'Traditional Mortgage' option with rating 9. The legal service chosen is the 'Complete premium package'—this corresponds to the 'Premium Legal Package' in the ground truth, rated 9. The moving service used ('Complete premium package - family relocation', CAD $650) matches 'Standard Moving' (rating 8) by cost and description. The 'Basic Utilities Setup - premium package' (CAD $280) corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
